name: Version History panel opens and allows restoring a saved version
description: When the user is on the Editor tab and clicks the History button, the Version History panel opens showing saved code versions with timestamps, labels, and sizes. Each version has a restore button. Clicking restore applies the version and shows a confirmation notice.

planSteps.description: Verify the editor view is visible by default (first tab) with a code editor area and a file explorer sidebar
Find the History button in the editor toolbar — it has a History (clock) icon and may show a count badge
Click the History button to open the Version History panel
Verify a Version History panel appears with the title 'سجل التغييرات' (Change History)
Verify the panel either shows a list of saved versions (each with a number, label, size, and timestamp) or shows an empty-state message 'لا توجد نسخ محفوظة بعد' if no versions exist yet
If saved versions exist, hover over one of the version entries to reveal the restore button labeled 'استعادة'
Click the restore button ('استعادة') on one of the saved versions
Verify a confirmation notice appears with the text '✓ تم استعادة النسخة بنجاح' (Version restored successfully)
Verify the Version History panel closes after restoring
If no versions exist, click the close (X) button on the Version History panel header
Verify the Version History panel closes
